story.iWant: content script để run coin detection trên web pages
story.soThat: coins are detected khi user visits crypto websites

subtasks.subtask: Register content script in manifest.json (verify from Story 10.2)
Test content script appears in Chrome DevTools
Add window load event listener (for dynamic pages)
Run coin detection khi page is ready
Test detection finds coins on sample pages
Run detection on new content added
Debounce detection calls to avoid performance issues
Fallback to setTimeout if requestIdleCallback not available
Test performance impact on page load
Verify detection works on each site
Test với different page sections (coin lists, detail pages, etc.)

acceptanceCriteria.ac: Content script runs on page load
Content script scans page DOM cho coin names
Detection runs on DOM mutations (new content loaded)
Performance optimization: use `requestIdleCallback` cho non-critical detection
Content script tested trên CoinGecko, Binance, CoinMarketCap

doc.title: Browser Extension Architecture - Suna.so
doc.snippet: Content script pattern với detectCoins function. Content script runs in isolated world, can access DOM but not page JavaScript. Must be registered in manifest với matches patterns.

doc.title: Story 10.2: Extension Manifest Configuration
doc.snippet: Content script configuration in manifest.json với matches patterns for crypto websites. Content script registered với run_at: "document_idle".

doc.title: Story 11.1: Coin Detection Algorithm
doc.snippet: Coin detector module created với detectCoins function. Function signature: detectCoins(element: HTMLElement): CoinDetection[]. Can be imported và used in content script.

file.reason: Import detectCoins function từ shared module. Function signature: detectCoins(element: HTMLElement): CoinDetection[].
Content script registration in manifest. Verify matches patterns include crypto websites. Verify run_at setting.
Main content script file location. Will be compiled to dist/content-script.js.

constraint.description: Content script runs in isolated world (separate from page JavaScript). Can access DOM but not page's JavaScript variables. Must be registered in manifest.json với matches patterns.
Use requestIdleCallback for non-critical detection. Debounce/throttle detection calls. Skip detection on hidden elements. Limit detection frequency to avoid performance impact.
Observe DOM mutations để detect new content. Use MutationObserver với childList changes. Debounce detection calls to avoid performance issues.

tests.standards: Testing standards: Verify content script loads on target websites, test coin detection runs on page load, test detection runs on DOM mutations, test performance optimization works, test trên all target crypto websites, verify no console errors. Use Chrome DevTools để verify content script execution.

ideas.test: Verify content script file exists và is registered in manifest
Test content script runs on page load (check DevTools Console)
Test detectCoins function is called và returns results
Test MutationObserver detects new content và runs detection
Test requestIdleCallback is used for non-critical detection
Test trên CoinGecko, Binance, CoinMarketCap và verify detection works
